channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Using saliva to detect disease holds promise, but it's not perfected yet
item.description: Easier than a blood test, saliva tests have the potential to detect cavities, infections and even cancer. But a lack of insurance coverage and other o...

item.title: What worked and what didn't with a cellphone ban at a Kentucky school
item.description: Keeping students off their devices is the new norm in many schools. We talked to students and educators at one Kentucky school to see how it's working...

item.title: Trump says he doesn't know if aliens are real but directs government to release files on UFOs
item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that he's directing the Pentagon and other government agencies to release files related to extraterrestrials and ...

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American man during an attack on a village, the Palestinian Health Ministry s...

item.title: Scientists worry about lasting damage from Potomac sewage spill
item.description: Drinking water around the District of Columbia hasn't been contaminated. But scientists say the environmental damage could be severe.

item.title: Mother and infant burnt to death in Indian state over witchcraft allegations
item.description: Eyewitnesses say a mob stormed the woman's home after rumours spread that she was practising witchcraft.

item.title: Grey's Anatomy star Eric Dane dies at 53 after ALS diagnosis
item.description: The actor, who also starred in HBO's Euphoria, battled the most common form of motor neurone disease.

item.title: 2/19: CBS Evening News
item.description: Former Prince Andrew released but not cleared after arrest in connection with Epstein files; NASAâs new head criticizes Boeing, NASA for botched Starl...

item.title: Asos co-founder dies after Thailand apartment block fall
item.description: Quentin Griffiths co-founded Asos in 2000 and remained a significant shareholder after leaving the firm five years later.

item.title: 2/19: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Former Prince Andrew arrested over revelations in Epstein files; U.S. women's hockey team wins gold after victory over Canada.

item.title: Eric Dane, "Grey's Anatomy" star diagnosed with ALS, dies at 53
item.description: In April 2025, Eric Dane announced he had been diagnosedâ with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS.

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
Austrian climber found guilty after girlfriend froze to death on mountain
item.description: The woman died of hypothermia during a climbing trip on the Grossglockner mountain in January 2025.

item.title: Trump directs US government to prepare release of files on aliens and UFOs
item.description: Trump says he will seek release of files on extraterrestrials, "based on the tremendous interest shown".

item.title: See where homeowners pay the highest property taxes by county and state
item.description: The median property tax bill in the U.S. soared 30% between 2019 and 2024, compounding the financial pressures on millions of Americans.

item.title: 2/3: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: President Trump signs bill ending partial government shutdown; Mr. Trump says Republicans should "nationalize" elections.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
item.description: The Palestinian Health Ministry and a witness say that Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank shot and killed a Palestinian American in an attack ...
